business_ideas.idea: Lusso Cloud: comfort footwear brand competing in $3B market vs Uggs/Crocs/Birkenstocks
Beauty water filtration system: shower purification for hair/skin care
Adaptogenic plant-based bar and drink mix line: superfoods/wellness line
Mind Right Bars: nootropic supplement bars
Real estate portfolio: manufactured housing, multi-family, storage units, RV parks

predictions.text: Built 17 companies, sold 6 for $450M+ cumulative since 2016
Production company acquisition deal valued ~$125-130M for his 70% stake
Key lesson: founder-market fit critical; experienced founders in new industries get crushed by learning curve
Comfort footwear wave (UGGs/Crocs/Birkenstocks trend) expected to be very big
